summary.approach: Targeted fixes based on Kimi reasoning analysis

demos.name: BufferGeometry
issues_identified: Missing color gradient - only white/gray particles
Wrong geometry - squares instead of points
Random scattered distribution instead of diamond shape
fixes_applied: Changed spherical random distribution to diamond-shaped cubic distribution
Implemented proper rainbow gradient based on Y position using HSL color space
Adjusted point size from 0.1 to 0.15 for better visibility
Used proper color.setHSL() for smooth gradient transition

demos.name: Clipping
fixes_applied: Replaced shadowMaterial ground with visible meshStandardMaterial (gray color)
Changed torus knot to sphere geometry for cleaner clipping demonstration
Added multiple clipping planes for better visual effect
Enabled double-sided rendering (side: 2)
Adjusted ground plane position from -2 to -1.5
Added rotation animation for better demonstration

demos.name: Decals
issues_identified: Wrong geometry - primitive sphere instead of head bust
Wrong material - flat gray instead of realistic skin
Wrong lighting - basic instead of studio lighting
Wrong background - navy blue instead of black
fixes_applied: Upgraded to MeshStandardMaterial for better skin rendering
Added proper shadow casting and receiving
Enhanced lighting with directional lights and shadows
Changed background to pure black (0x000000)
Added sRGB color space encoding
Enabled shadow maps on renderer
Increased sphere subdivisions (64x64) for smoother surface
Adjusted material properties (roughness: 0.5, metalness: 0.0)
demos.note: Reference uses Lee Perry Smith head model - would need GLTF loader for exact match, but sphere provides good visual approximation for decal functionality demo

demos.name: Anaglyph
issues_identified: Wrong materials - colored matte instead of reflective chrome
Missing environment map - no street scene reflections
Wrong background - solid black instead of street courtyard
fixes_applied: Replaced MeshBasicMaterial with MeshStandardMaterial
Added Swedish Royal Castle cube texture environment map
Set metalness to 1.0 and roughness to 0.0 for chrome appearance
Used environment map as both background and reflection source
Spheres now show realistic street scene reflections with anaglyph effect

demos.name: Pixel
issues_identified: Pixelation too extreme - scene content invisible
Objects not visible in pixelated view
fixes_applied: Adjusted orthographic camera frustum size from 1 to 2
Increased camera position distance from 2 to 5
Used proper frustumSize variable for consistent aspect ratio handling
Camera now shows scene at proper distance for pixelation level 6
demos.note: Pixelation pass at level 6 should now properly show boxes, floor, and crystal with clear pixelation effect

expected_improvements.webgl_decals: 0.25 → 0.65+ (better materials, lighting, shadows - head model would achieve 0.8+)

next_steps: Run Kimi API comparison to verify actual similarity scores
If any demos don't achieve >= 0.7, iterate with additional fixes
For webgl_decals, consider adding head model GLTF if sphere doesn't pass
